mapper.select: select id as chunk_id, chunk_index, chapter_path, page_no, chunk_type, content, char_count, vector_id, vector_status, coalesce(is_edited, 0) as is_edited from km_document_chunk where doc_id = #{docId} and ( is_active = 1 or version_no = ( select max(version_no) from km_document_version where doc_id = #{docId} and version_status = 'PENDING_REVIEW' ) ) order by chunk_index asc

select c.id as chunkId, c.doc_id as docId, d.kb_id as kbId, c.version_no as versionNo, c.chunk_index as chunkIndex, c.content, c.content_version as contentVersion, c.chapter_path as chapterPath, c.page_no as pageNo, c.chunk_type as chunkType, c.char_count as charCount, c.vector_id as vectorId, c.vector_status as vectorStatus from km_document_chunk c join km_document d on d.id = c.doc_id where c.id = #{chunkId} and c.is_active = 1 and d.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: update km_document_chunk set content = #{content}, char_count = #{charCount}, content_version = content_version + 1, is_edited = 1, vector_status = 'PENDING', updated_at = now() where id = #{chunkId} and is_active = 1
